textByHash.96e6a776cbe42355b70a21ed4c4f9e87b87935df: Hello, I am here to investigate rumours of a dark magical presence in these lands.
textByHash.e15cb8b5b599575077c91a2b79320be1a28c2748: I've heard there are hidden ruins in the mountains here with the power to re-animate beings from the dead. Zandar Horfyre sent me to study them.
textByHash.4c37ff564a8c27d333ce62ec836e7ca9fa6d7ef3: Sadly no but I will find them, I will begin looking for information in Arceeus, they seem like my kind of people.
textByHash.3c06490e93bcc2dde63f5d55c88d157247fb519b: I'm working on combining the dark teleportation magic of these lands into physical form.
textByHash.4c6ec49333f262e5d9f12f051c780fcfc400be7f: Yes, but not made quite the same way.
textByHash.015e38cd21434cae826c22a67a07c5d77a5f19c6: If you must. That lectern over there contains the book I've been working on.
textByHash.5edae072d894433256defeb9879d7477b0e71a07: I am seeking to understand more about the dark powers present in these lands. Now leave me be, there is much to be learned.
